prompt: Edit this photograph. Keep the woman and her navy-and-white fine pinstripe sleeveless tiered maxi dress EXACTLY as they are: do not change, redraw, restyle, or recolor the dress, its stripes, gathers, waist, tiers, hem, or her body, pose, hands, hair or face. Preserve every fold and every stripe precisely. Change ONLY the setting around her. Replace the plain white studio background and the white tufted ottoman with a sun-warmed Greek-island (Milos) scene: she is seated on a low whitewashed stone ledge in a quiet Cycladic lane, chalky white plaster walls, a few worn stone steps, a hint of deep blue sea beyond. Warm late-afternoon Mediterranean sunlight from one side, soft directional light, gentle realistic shadows, and a correct contact shadow where she sits and where her feet meet the ground. Photorealistic, matching the light direction and warmth across the whole frame so she sits naturally in the scene.
